reports.task: Analyze successful X accounts in the sound money, gold, and crypto education space
reports.summary: Comprehensive analysis of @PeterSchiff, @zerohedge, @RealVision, and @GoldTelegraph strategies. Identified key success patterns: consistency over perfection, contrarian positioning, educational authority, and real-time commentary. Delivered actionable content strategy recommendations for @DigitalGold authority building.

reports.task: Research successful X accounts in fintech education, DeFi, and tokenization space
reports.summary: Analyzed @centrifuge and institutional RWA accounts for @LSD_Gold strategy. Delivered professional content framework: 30% educational leadership, 25% product updates, 25% thought leadership, 20% community. Emphasized institutional positioning, regulatory compliance, and partnership-focused approach.
